title: Documentation and AI assistance deterministic misconception check

publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Documentation and AI assistance; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Documentation and AI assistance: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? A fluent answer from documentation search or an AI tool can be submitted without verification if it looks conventional.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Retain ownership by narrowing the request, checking source and version, testing normal and boundary behavior, and explaining every submitted decision.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Retain ownership by narrowing the request, checking source and version, testing normal and boundary behavior, and explaining every submitted decision.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Documentation and AI assistance instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Retain ownership by narrowing the request, checking source and version, testing normal and boundary behavior, and explaining every submitted decision.
A fluent answer from documentation search or an AI tool can be submitted without verification if it looks conventional.
